These crispy, bite-sized rolls are coated with a flavorful chicken floss seasoning, delivering a rich, satisfying taste with every crunch. Made from high-quality ingredients like wheat flour, non-hydrogenated vegetable oil, and chili powder, these rolls are perfect for those who love a savory, crunchy snack. Whether you're at home or on the go, these rolls bring the perfect combination of chicken flavor and crispy texture.

tags.name: Marketplace

product.description:
Exclusive and first in Fragrance! Our "Black Pork" Bak Kwa is manufactured using 100% USA Berkshire Pork, and is marinated with our unique recipe of 18 precious herbs and spices. Each piece is individually vacuum-sealed for freshness, with no added preservatives, and is 100% made in Singapore.

Berkshire Hogs, better known as Kurobuta (meaning 'black pig' in Japanese), are known to produce supreme quality gourmet pork due to its rich marbling, tenderness, and flavor. They are famously known as the "Kobe beef of pork", and is recognized as the highest quality pork in the world. No hormone or antibiotics were used in their feeding process, and the pork is minimally processed without the use of artificial ingredients.

metaData.Storage Information: To store in a cool dry place

product.name: Fragrance Kurobuta Bak Kwa (USA)
